name: Phoenix Sintered Metals
description: Phoenix Sintered Metals, LLC specializes in Powder Metal Technology, providing high-quality sintered metal parts tailored to customer specifications. With a focus on innovative solutions and operational excellence, the company serves various markets, including Automotive and Agriculture, making it a recognized leader in sintering processes.

name: Primetals Technologies
description: Primetals Technologies offers high-quality sinter production at low costs, emphasizing intelligent automation for sinter plants.

name: SINTERIS Industria Prodotti Sinterizzati Spa
description: Sinteris is a manufacturer that specializes in powder metallurgy, particularly in producing sintered steel mechanical components customized to client specifications. The company emphasizes innovative solutions and flexible production processes.

name: C12 Advanced Technologies
description: C12 Advanced Technologies specializes in high-quality materials for sintering ceramic and powdered metallurgy components. Their innovative thermal processing solutions include sintering setters and other related products, making them a key player in the sintering industry.

name: SEFPRO
description: SEFPRO offers a diverse selection of sintered materials specifically designed for glass furnace applications, highlighting their expertise in refractory solutions for the industry.

name: Sintering Solutions Pvt Ltd.
description: Sintering Solutions Pvt Ltd is a specialized manufacturer of sintered parts, offering both ferrous and non-ferrous components tailored to customer specifications. With IATF approval and a commitment to high standards since 2016, they position themselves as a key player in the sintering industry.

name: Materion
description: The company specializes in material pressing and sintering processes, offering custom solutions and a broad range of technologies to meet industry needs.

name: Mersen SA
description: Mersen specializes in advanced materials and offers high-strength graphite specifically designed for pressure sintering, which is crucial for optimizing the performance and longevity of sintering molds.

name: Metshape
description: MetShape GmbH is a specialized production service provider that focuses on sinter-based additive manufacturing, particularly for small and micro metal parts. They have developed unique expertise in the sintering process, offering dedicated sinter services for all metal 3D printed components.

name: FJ Industries
description: FJ Industries is a global supplier specializing in powder metal products, with a significant focus on producing parts for various industrial applications through sintering technology.
